title: Argentinian Hash Browns
description: A crispy and flavorful side dish inspired by the Argentinian cuisine. Hash browns are made with shredded potatoes and can be served with a variety of main courses.
instructions: Toss the shredded potatoes with the creamy mayonnaise or sour cream until they are well coated.
Spread the potato mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle the hash paprika over the top of the potatoes.
Bake the potatoes for 20-25 minutes, or until they are crispy and golden brown.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the hash browns hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
